summary: Tested update mode for: Header navigation reorder (Logo → HOME → IMMOBILIENANGEBOT → INFRASTRUKTUR-RADAR), Podgorica as 5th region added to dropdown, Admin panel Regionen tab for CMS-managed region landingpages. All 73 frontend tests and 36 backend tests passing.

header_navigation_reorder.description: Navigation order verified: Logo → HOME → IMMOBILIENANGEBOT dropdown → INFRASTRUKTUR-RADAR (with NEU badge)
tests: HOME link visible with correct styling

podgorica_5th_region.description: Podgorica added as 5th region in dropdown and mobile accordion
tests: Desktop dropdown shows all 5 regions including Podgorica
Mobile accordion shows all 5 regions including Podgorica

podgorica_landing_page.description: Podgorica page loads with Investment-Score 90/100 and all required sections
tests: Page loads with correct structure (Business-Hub & Hauptstadt)
Exposé CTA opens form and form submits successfully

admin_regionen_tab.description: Admin panel now has 3 tabs: Artikel, Kommentare, Regionen
tests: Regionen tab shows empty state when no regions
Region form has slug dropdown with 5 predefined regions

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Test regions are cleaned up after each test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified: Header reordered (HOME → IMMOBILIENANGEBOT → INFRASTRUKTUR-RADAR), Podgorica as 5th region with Investment-Score 90/100, Admin panel has Regionen tab with slug dropdown for 5 predefined regions. Backend regions API fully functional. Executive Inquiry form on Serbia Executive page remains MOCKED (by design).
